# Copilot Coding Agent Configuration

This file configures the Copilot coding agent for the `matz3ix/godot-kaisendon-game` repository.

## Project Overview

This is a Godot 4.x 2D game — a seafood delivery (海鮮丼デリバリー) game. The game design is described in `DESIGN.md`.

## Guidelines

- Use Godot 4.x scene format (`format=3`) for all `.tscn` files.
- GDScript files live under `src/` and scenes under `scenes/`.
- Follow the game design in `DESIGN.md` when implementing or modifying game logic.
- Do not modify `DESIGN.md` unless explicitly asked.
